actions.title: Soil moisture recharge programme in Low moisture zones
actions.description: 35 locations show soil moisture below 0.146 — the lowest quartile for Ahmedabad. Groundwater recharge pits and rainwater harvesting structures recommended.
actions.estimated_impact: Improve soil moisture and reduce surface heating

actions.title: Cool roof mandate for top hottest ward locations
actions.description: 10 locations with LST above 36.5°C in dense urban areas where tree plantation is not feasible. Cool roof coating mandate recommended for all new constructions.

triggered_by.finding: High LST in dense urban areas

actions.estimated_impact: Reduce indoor temperatures and surface heat

actions.title: Monthly satellite monitoring protocol for vegetation recovery
actions.description: 85.9% of Ahmedabad shows stressed or barren vegetation. A monthly NDVI monitoring protocol using Sentinel-2 data will track recovery after interventions.
